item.title: SPIKE: swift-markdown Incremental Parsing
item.intent: Evaluate whether swift-markdown supports incremental parsing and design the debounce + local-update strategy for large documents
item.description: Evaluate swift-markdown for partial/incremental re-parse capability. Benchmark full re-parse time on a 10,000-line markdown document on iPhone 15. If incremental parse is not feasible, design and validate the debounce strategy: full re-parse on ~300ms editing pause on background thread, with lightweight per-paragraph local attribute updates between parses for <16ms keystroke response. Blocks FEAT-038 (Parser). Updates architecture decisions [A-003] and [A-017].
acceptanceCriteria: Full re-parse time for 10,000-line document measured on iPhone 15
Incremental parse feasibility documented (supported or not)
If not incremental: debounce + local-update strategy validated with prototype
Architecture decisions [A-003] and [A-017] updated based on findings
